content: 依旧只回英文，还是不太理解为什么如此忘恩负义和区别对待…当初没有我们的全力支持也绝对不会有今天让你傲慢的机会<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

<@1487626955791663208> Dear Light, I would like to ask, will 24 get a new talent that is the same as the other awakers? 
Most of the awakers have talent or E1 with the function of "For every 1% XXX that Awaker has, the XXX will increase XX%."
Besides, Aurita has 2 different talents, which are "Aliemus Regen Level" and "Crit Rate."
Then why do some of the awakers from Faded Legacy still not have any talent?
Better place here in suggestion. I'm 99% sure he won't answer here <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
<@920561286578856007> 24 limited and too strong.Aurita no.Light keep balance in game as you guys want.What else you need?

? Isn't it obvious? I want fair
Maybe you don't know, but light had promised us all of the awaker will have it's own talent when BIAV team  introduce the first draft of the talent for limited awaker
And if you want to say that I use 24 and Aurita to do the comparison is not fair for Aurita
Ok I accept what you say
So after this I will use 24 and Arachne to do the compare
Or now you want to say that 24 is more stronger that Arachne<:Aurita_pinch:1468258028271833119> 
This compare is no fair for Arachne<:question2:1356053130336272414>

the real purpose of giving Saya dissolution ink is to make her rouse actively sabotage your entire deck, so now you have to buy premium battlepass for rewind feature <:ramona_tuff_:1441426630420467753> 
"you literally will need it to rewind the turn if you play the wrong card and waste your preciuous arithmetica lmao, f2p get rekt give me $$$ or saya unplayable you filthy peasants" _ BIVA
not only the rerun banners are trash, even the collab character require real money to play around her shitty gimmick
at this point I have no hope for GTulu, bozo probably will be an unplayable mess that require a full AA squad and 10 premium BP to function <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

To me the problem is “dissolution ink” is now renamed to another word according to Saya’s story, and not only the story but the whole battle system of it is now entirely changed.

1) Saya can now earn extra kyouki from those cards because they are now all have the same state with Saya’s skill.

2) The “new dissolution ink” will now be reset to normal card if you throw them away from your hand, while the original dissolution ink will remain unreadable even if you throw them away.

The 2nd change in face makes it easier to deal with unreadable cards: if you don’t want extra kyouki then just throw them away. But I think the 1st change is much worse then it seems, since it means they those old enemies are now benefiting Saya for no reason, with the sacrifice of destroying the meaning of their old stories.

1) it also implied Saya's pollen is the same thing with spreading dissolution ink onto command cards, it's just bullshit <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>  they've done it with a random girl (Vortice) having Divine Aequor, I suppose BIAV no longer care about Morimens lore but only care about cater new players and potential wallets

2) dissolution ink still make you unable to know if the card you're going to play is just a trashy strike/def or its an important card, you only know it after wasting arithmetica, the only real workaround is premium battlepass's turn rewind

Both the sudden lore change and the gameplay implications are just not ideal, Morimens really have been downgraded so much in the past 3 months <:dead:1356082627509092372>

In fact according to Saya’s original story from Song of Saya, it’s very reasonable for her to make cards unreadable, I just don’t like the direction that changing Morimens’ own story for a collaboration…however i totally agree with that Vortice shouldn’t be involved with Divine Aequor. I see the point that if put Vortice in normal Aequor she would be too strong as a defensive awakener (yes defensive XD), but I don’t like they didn’t come up a way to limit her defensive ability…well instead they just put her into a system with that feature but contradicting the lore.

Yeah although it’s possible to analyze which dissolution inked card is which…I mean yeah that’s somehow possible, but it’s just very inconvenient.
Honestly they can keep the divine aequor they just need to give it a different name on Vortice<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Vortice can keep Divine Aequor if her lore actually support it <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> Saya's Perception Warp also works slightly different with Dissolution Ink, it should've been a standalone effect like how Corrosion is different to Old Ember
BIAV really fumbled very, very, very hard this time
and they will probably keep getting worse and worse...

<@702167871144591461> Thank you I reread my words and solved the grammar problem *hopefully*

<@472371439555575809> the issue here is just Vortice should either has a different name for her own Divine Aequor or a different story to fit Divine Aequor… yet they did neither.

Yeah I agree with that they are different so they should be like the pair of Corrosion and Ember.

I even wrote a whole thread on this topic…

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1505262542552043600
